title: HorseInfo
description: You can see horse speed, jump height and health.
body:
**HorseInfo** is a lightweight client-side Minecraft mod that displays horse stats directly on your screen. Whether you're breeding or just trying to find the fastest ride, this mod makes it easy to compare horses without any guesswork.

**How to use** Just ride the horse, and its stats will appear in the bottom right corner of your screen.
![ModImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87c9a86742880e4fdc1db2a5cc2758062f018f8b.png)
